inputs.titre: Clovis receives the title of consul

reason: The image depicts a man standing on a stone platform, wearing clothing appropriate for a medieval setting. The architecture is simple, with wooden walls and candle lighting. There are no obvious anachronisms or fantastical elements present. However, the overall aesthetic is a bit too "clean" and well-lit for the early medieval period (508 AD). The lighting from the candles seems unrealistic, being too uniform and bright. The clothing also seems in good condition, lacking the wear and tear expected of the time. While there are elements that evoke a sense of the period, some details feel anachronistic in their perfection.
